Rust uses `#[serde(flatten)]` for the same effect.

PnlDetailItem.description: PnL detail for a single wallet-token pair (mirrors TS PnlDetailItemDTO).

PnlDetailSummary.description: Aggregated PnL summary across all items (mirrors TS PnlDetailSummaryDTO).

PnlDetailsResult.description: Full PnL details result with cursor pagination.

RangeFilterCondition.description: Range filter condition – mirrors TS `FilterCondition` used with min/max.

Token.description:
Token entity — mirrors TS `TokenDTO extends TokenMetadataDTO`.

TS uses class inheritance to flatten metadata into the top level.
Rust uses `#[serde(flatten)]` for the same effect.

description.example: USDC is a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar
USDC is a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar

TokenPage.description:
Token search result page — mirrors TS `TokenPage`.
Extends `PageResponse<Token>` with `countsByProtocols`.

TokenStats.description: Token statistics with nested time period data

periods.description:
Trade statistics grouped by time period (1m, 5m, 15m, 30m, 1h, 4h, 24h).
Each period contains full OHLCV data, trade counts, and previous-period comparisons.
See `TokenTradeStatPeriod` schema for all fields.

TokenTradeStatPeriod.description: Single time window trade statistics period

percentileRankTradeAmountInUsd.description: Percentile rank of trade amount in USD (pro/insider)

TopTraderSortBy.description: Sort field for top traders query

sideTokenAmountInNative.description: Side token amount in native currency

sideTokenPriceInNative.description: Side token price in native currency

UpdateWebhookRequest.description: Request to update a webhook endpoint

WalletNetWorthChartResponse.description: Wallet net-worth chart response with pagination.

WalletNetWorthDetailsPage.description: Paginated wallet net-worth details (mirrors TS WalletNetWorthDetailsPage).

WalletNetWorthPage.description: Paginated wallet net-worth page (mirrors TS WalletNetWorthPage).

WalletPnlSummary.description: Wallet PnL Summary (aggregated across all tokens for a given resolution)
